error_signature: code node gets stuck and spins endlessly
title: Code node stuck when accessing previous node data
symptom: The code node spins endlessly when trying to access data from a previous node, while other code nodes function normally.
not_this_if: Code node does not access previous node data
Code node is set to run once for all items
root_cause: The issue arises when code nodes are set to 'run once for each item' while trying to access data from previous nodes by name. This can lead to conflicts in data retrieval, causing the node to hang indefinitely.
fix_steps: Open the settings of the affected code node
Change the execution mode from 'run once for each item' to 'run once for all items'
agent_instruction: Change the execution mode of the code node to 'run once for all items' and save.
